task_context.actionable_question: How much are my absences hurting my grades?
task_context.ai_prompt_hint: Use absence_rate [FE] to show proportion of missed sessions. Correlate with avg_score [FE].

explanation.raw_text:
Summary: There is a noticeable pattern between your assessment order and normalized scores. As you progress through the assessments, your scores show improvement, but the initial absence may have impacted your early performance.

Insights: Initial Struggles: Your first assessment resulted in a score of 0, which indicates a strong negative impact from absences at that stage. This suggests that missing classes early on may have hindered your understanding of the material. | Improvement in Scores: In the subsequent assessments, your scores improved to 55, indicating a positive trend. This suggests that as you attended more classes, your understanding and performance improved.

Educational implications: Regular attendance is crucial for understanding course material and performing well in assessments.

Recommendations: high - Focus on attending all classes moving forward. - Consistent attendance will help reinforce your learning and improve your scores in future assessments.

explanation.summary: There is a noticeable pattern between your assessment order and normalized scores. As you progress through the assessments, your scores show improvement, but the initial absence may have impacted your early performance.

insights.title: Initial Struggles
insights.description: Your first assessment resulted in a score of 0, which indicates a strong negative impact from absences at that stage. This suggests that missing classes early on may have hindered your understanding of the material.

insights.title: Improvement in Scores
insights.description: In the subsequent assessments, your scores improved to 55, indicating a positive trend. This suggests that as you attended more classes, your understanding and performance improved.

educational_implications: Regular attendance is crucial for understanding course material and performing well in assessments.

recommendations.action: Focus on attending all classes moving forward.
recommendations.rationale: Consistent attendance will help reinforce your learning and improve your scores in future assessments.

confidence.reason: The data shows clear patterns in assessment scores and attendance, providing a reliable basis for these insights.

required_core_outputs.description: State the proportion of missed sessions.
Describe the observed association between absence rate and average score.

evaluation_constraints.description: Use absence_rate as the primary absence metric.
Frame the absence-score relationship as correlational, not causal.

evaluation_requirements.safety_fairness_note: Conservative pilot default; human review is required before any not_applicable exception.
